consolidation_opportunities.reason: All health checkpoint agents use the same health_checkpoint.py script with different prompts. Could consolidate into a single scheduled agent that runs at 5 different times based on checkpoint type (fasted, post-workout, meal, evening, pre-sleep).
consolidation_opportunities.recommended_action: Merge into single 'Health Checkpoint Orchestrator' agent with time-based routing

consolidation_opportunities.reason: Four meeting agents all run at identical times (5x daily: 6,9,12,15,18). They represent MG-1 (manifest), MG-2 (blocks), MG-4 (intros), MG-6 (state transition) pipeline stages.
consolidation_opportunities.recommended_action: Consider consolidating into 'Meeting Processing Pipeline' agent that executes stages in sequence

consolidation_opportunities.reason: Both morning tasks run at similar times (7 AM and 8 AM). Morning Task Briefing generates task summary; Unified Morning Digest generates broader digest. Could be a unified 'Morning Briefing' agent.
consolidation_opportunities.recommended_action: Consider merging into single Morning Briefing agent with multiple output sections

frequency_concerns.title: Context Graph Deep Backfill Agent Schedule
frequency_concerns.reason: Context graph extraction is quality-over-speed task per instruction. Running 9x daily may be excessive. Consider reducing to 3x for meaningful backfill intervals.

frequency_concerns.title: Careerspan Scan Results Email Monitoring
frequency_concerns.reason: Checking every hour for scan results may be overkill. Scan results are unlikely to arrive with urgency requiring hourly checks.

frequency_concerns.title: Recall Bot Health Check
frequency_concerns.reason: Checking bot status every 30 minutes is high frequency for a non-critical monitoring task. Every 2 hours would provide adequate coverage.

frequency_concerns.title: Script Execution Notification
frequency_concerns.reason: Instruction title is generic 'Script Execution Notification' but runs thought_provoker_scan_v2.py. Rename to reflect actual purpose or consolidate with other meeting-related scripts.

frequency_concerns.title: Weekly Performance Dashboard and HR Calendar Sync
frequency_concerns.reason: Performance dashboard is more useful in morning for planning the week ahead rather than Sunday evening.
